---
title: "Policy & Media"
---

::: {.wrapper}
::: {.main-section}

# Policy & Media

### In English

**VoxEU**

- [Inactive workers and mortality due to Covid-19: Evidence from the Italian lockdown](https://voxeu.org/article/inactive-workers-and-mortality-due-covid-19-evidence-italy), October 23, 2020, with Francesco Drago, Chiara Santantonio and Francesco Sobbrio.
- [Completing the Eurozone Banking Union](http://voxeu.org/article/completing-eurozone-banking-union), May 4, 2016, with Pietro Reichlin. [PDF](assets/policy-media/public-web/linked/voxeu-banking-union-2016.pdf)
- [The housing cost disease](https://cepr.org/voxeu/columns/housing-cost-disease), September 8, 2015, with Pietro Reichlin. [PDF](assets/policy-media/public-web/linked/voxeu-housing-cost-disease-2015.pdf)
- [Is Italy going to make it?](https://cepr.org/voxeu/columns/italy-going-make-it), February 4, 2012, with Gianfranco Di Vaio and Giuseppe Ragusa. [PDF](assets/policy-media/public-web/VoxEu/ItalianDebtDynamics_04022012.pdf)

**EuVisions**

- [Greece: How long before economic normality?](http://www.euvisions.eu/before-economic-normality/), October 14, 2016.
- [Is debt restructuring the right solution for Greece?](http://www.euvisions.eu/is-debt-restructuring-the-right-solution-for-greece/), May 20, 2016.

**Financial Times letters**

- [So much more to Sicily than fried risotto balls](https://www.ft.com/content/9af0a464-c323-11e7-a1d2-6786f39ef675), November 8, 2017.
- [Italy must dig deeper to close gap with Germany](https://www.ft.com/content/ca8e88f4-3a73-11e3-b234-00144feab7de), October 22, 2013.

### In Italian

**Il Sole 24 Ore**

- [Europa e Stati Uniti: perche' sono due inflazioni diverse](assets/policy-media/04-borri_sole24ore_21_luglio_2022.pdf), July 21, 2022.
- [Linee di credito a lungo termine per convincere i rigoristi del nord](assets/policy-media/05-analisi_covid19_sole_03262020.pdf), March 26, 2020, with Salvatore Nistico and Pietro Reichlin.
- [Default, i costi reali di un'ipotesi remota](assets/policy-media/06-editoriale_sole_22112019.pdf), November 22, 2019.
- [Piu' trasparenza per ritrovare la fiducia dei risparmiatori](assets/policy-media/07-editoriale_sole_19112019.pdf), November 20, 2019.
- [Investitori retail, la lezione del caso bio-on](assets/policy-media/08-bioon_sole24ore_Nov2019.pdf), November 1, 2019.
- [I nodi irrisolti della direttiva sul bail-in](assets/policy-media/public-web/linked/sole24ore-bail-in-2016.pdf), May 13, 2016, with Pietro Reichlin.
- [E-bond a prova di Berlino](assets/policy-media/public-web/Sole24Ore/e-bonds_11dec2010.pdf), December 11, 2010, with Pietro Reichlin.
- [L'Irlanda sta male ma non infetta](assets/policy-media/public-web/Sole24Ore/Irlandastamalemanoninfetta-IlSole24ORE_2Oct2010.pdf), October 2, 2010, with Pietro Reichlin.
- [Un piano di salvataggio con piu' costi che utili](assets/policy-media/public-web/Sole24Ore/PianoSalvataggio_Sole24Ore_31Aug2010.pdf), August 31, 2010, with Pietro Reichlin.
- [Tassare le banche incentivo all'azzardo](assets/policy-media/public-web/Sole24Ore/Tassarelebancheincentivoall%27azzardo-IlSole24ORE_1July2010.pdf), July 1, 2010, with Pietro Reichlin.

**Lavoce.info**

- [La Grecia volta pagina, i problemi no](https://www.lavoce.info/archives/60463/la-grecia-volta-pagina-i-problemi-no/), July 12, 2019.
- [Autogol sui PIR: meno efficaci e piu' rischiosi](https://www.lavoce.info/archives/59486/autogol-sui-pir-meno-efficaci-e-piu-rischiosi/), June 4, 2019.
- [Se l'Italia non ha il paracadute](http://www.lavoce.info/archives/55610/italia-senza-paracadute/), October 23, 2018.
- PIR, un investimento che piace agli italiani, October 9, 2018.
- In Grecia torna il sereno, ma nuove nuvole in Europa, September 4, 2018.
- E in Grecia per la Troika e' missione compiuta, June 22, 2018.
- Germogli di crescita in Grecia. Ma e' davvero primavera?, September 15, 2017.
- [Grecia: la saga del debito e' sempre piu' una odissea](assets/policy-media/public-web/linked/lavoce-grecia-saga-debito-2017.pdf), June 20, 2017.
- [Grecia, la fine della saga resta lontana](assets/policy-media/public-web/linked/lavoce-grecia-fine-saga-2017.pdf), May 9, 2017.
- [BCE oltre il mandato. Ma per necessita'](assets/policy-media/public-web/linked/lavoce-bce-oltre-mandato-2017.pdf), March 31, 2017.
- [Torna in scena lo scontro sul debito greco](assets/policy-media/public-web/linked/lavoce-scontro-debito-greco-2017.pdf), February 21, 2017.
- [Piu' rischi che benefici dai piani individuali di risparmio](assets/policy-media/public-web/linked/lavoce-pir-rischi-benefici-2017.pdf), January 13, 2017.

**Linkiesta**

- [Sei regole per non farsi spennare dalle banche](assets/policy-media/public-web/linked/linkiesta-sei-regole-banche-2016.pdf), January 8, 2016.
- [Banche e fondi di investimento: separiamoli o saranno guai seri](assets/policy-media/public-web/linked/linkiesta-banche-fondi-investimento-2015.pdf), December 21, 2015.
- [Le borse crollano, non prendetevela con Draghi](assets/policy-media/public-web/linked/linkiesta-borse-draghi-2015.pdf), December 4, 2015.
- [Spending review, anche Renzi ha fallito](assets/policy-media/public-web/linked/linkiesta-spending-review-renzi-2015.pdf), October 16, 2015.
- [Usiamo la flessibilita' per le riforme, non per il consenso](assets/policy-media/public-web/linked/linkiesta-flessibilita-riforme-2015.pdf), September 21, 2015.
- [Perche' il "funerale" della Tasi non convince](assets/policy-media/public-web/linked/linkiesta-funerale-tasi-2015.pdf), September 4, 2015.
- [Cina, il problema non e' economico ma politico](assets/policy-media/public-web/linked/linkiesta-cina-problema-politico-2015.pdf), August 26, 2015.
- [Attenti all'euforia per il QE, inseguire i rendimenti passati costa caro](assets/policy-media/public-web/Linkiesta/borri_apr2015.pdf), April 16, 2015.

:::
::: {.sidenav}
{{< include _includes/sidebar.qmd >}}
:::
:::
